title: Fix CSS Inconsistent Box Model Styles

statement.markdown: Given a string of CSS styles, fix the inconsistent box model styles by replacing the `box-sizing` property with the correct value and maintaining the original padding and margin values.
statement.inputFormat: A string of CSS styles in the format `'.container { ... }'`
statement.outputFormat: A string of CSS styles with the `box-sizing` property replaced and padding and margin values maintained
statement.notes: The input string may contain multiple styles, and the `box-sizing` property may be set to an incorrect value.

constraints.description: The number of styles in the input string

examples.explanation: The input style already has the correct box model value.
The input style has an incorrect box model value, which needs to be replaced.

hints.text: Check the `box-sizing` property value and replace it with the correct value if necessary.

editorial.title: Editorial: Fixing Inconsistent Box Model Styles
editorial.intuition: The correct box model values are `border-box` and `content-box`. Replace the incorrect value with the correct one.
editorial.bruteForce: Iterate through the styles in the input string and check the `box-sizing` property value. Replace it if necessary.
editorial.betterSolution: Use a regular expression to replace the incorrect `box-sizing` value with the correct one.
editorial.optimalSolution: Use a CSS parser library to parse the input string and replace the incorrect `box-sizing` value with the correct one.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The solution should maintain the original padding and margin values and replace the `box-sizing` property with the correct value.
editorial.dryRun: Test the solution with the provided examples and edge cases.
commonMistakes: Replacing the `box-sizing` value with the wrong correct value
Ignoring the padding and margin values

testCases.input:
.container { width: 100px; padding: 10px; box-sizing: border-box; }
.container { width: 100px; padding: 10px; box-sizing: content-box; }
testCases.output:
.container { width: 100px; padding: 10px; box-sizing: border-box; }
.container { width: 100px; box-sizing: border-box; }
